user.title: Rejseplanen Setup
user.description: Enter your Rejseplanen Labs API key and preferred update interval. You can apply for a personal API key at https://labs.rejseplanen.dk

add_station.title: Add Station
add_station.description: Search for a departure station by name.

select_station.title: Select Station
select_station.description: Select the station from the search results.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect. Check your API key and internet connection.
error.no_stations_found: No stations found. Try a different name or spelling.

abort.already_configured: Rejseplanen is already configured. Use the options flow to manage stations.

add_station.title: Add Station
add_station.description: Search for a departure station by name.

select_station.title: Select Station
select_station.description: Select the station from the search results.

remove_station.title: Remove Stations
remove_station.description: Select one or more stations to remove.

update_interval.title: Update Interval
update_interval.description: How often to fetch new departure boards. Note: with the personal API limit of 50,000 requests/month, 10 minutes supports up to ~11 stations safely.

error.no_stations_found: No stations found. Try a different name or spelling.
